data.title: U.S. mortgage market sees a surge as borrowing costs drop, with mortgage application volume jumping 29.7% in a week. Refinancing activity is up 57.7%, with the benchmark 30-year fixed mortgage rate at 6.39%.
data.description: The U.S. mortgage market is experiencing a significant uptick as borrowing costs plummeted, prompting a surge in refinancing activity. During the week ending Sept. 12, total mortgage application volume increased by 29.7%, the largest weekly gain since January. The 30-year fixed mortgage rate dropped by 10 basis points to 6.39%, the lowest level in nearly a year. Refinancing activity soared by 57.7%, with the Mortgage Refinance Index reaching its highest level since March 2022. The surge in refinancing indicates that homeowners are proactively locking in savings ahead of the expected interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve. MBA's chief economist noted that borrowers are moving swiftly in anticipation of lower rates, with refinance application volume spiking almost 60% from the prior week.

data.title: Dow Jones acquires Eco-Movement, a global platform for EV charging data. Eco-Movement to be part of OPIS.
data.description: In a recent development, Dow Jones has successfully completed the acquisition of Eco-Movement, a prominent worldwide platform specializing in EV charging station data. This strategic acquisition positions Eco-Movement as an integral component of OPIS, Dow Jones’s expanding energy division. Based in Utrecht, Netherlands, Eco-Movement is at the forefront of charge point data platforms, excelling in gathering, refining, and enhancing EV charging station data. The company's comprehensive data platform encompasses public and semi-public EV charging points, along with their up-to-the-minute availability status.

data.title: ADC market to double to $9 billion by 2030, from $4.5 billion in 2024, driven by digital acceleration and rising security demands.

The global report delves into the ADC market, examining Product Types, Company Types, and Industry Sectors both globally and regionally.

data.title: LEO Pharma shares Phase 3 Delgocitinib Cream results for adolescents with Chronic Hand Eczema.
data.description: In Ballerup, Denmark, LEO Pharma recently showcased groundbreaking Phase 3 data on Delgocitinib Cream for adolescents with moderate to severe Chronic Hand Eczema (CHE). This late-breaking study revealed significant insights into the effectiveness of the cream in managing this condition. This demonstrates LEO Pharma’s commitment to developing solutions for skin conditions.
